EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Host {dst.host} provided a record of the "{datafield3}" type about the resource "{object.name}" to the client from host {src.host} on host {event_src.host}

A DNS response from host {dst.host} containing a record of the "{datafield3}" type about the resource "{object.name}" is modified on host {event_src.host}. The client is redirected to the portal. Reason: {reason}.
A DNS response from host {dst.host} containing a record of the "{datafield3}" type about the resource "{object.name}" is blocked on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
